name: Front Porch Fried Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine the cornbread mix, garlic powder, and dried thyme.
2. Dip each catfish fillet in buttermilk, allowing excess to drip off.
3. Sprinkle with salt and ground black pepper and red pepper.
4. Dredge in the cornbread mixture.
5. Heat peanut oil to 400°F in an electric fryer or Dutch oven.
6. Fry the fillets, two at a time, for 2 to 3 minutes or until they float.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
